content: Intrinsic curiosity signals from ICM/RND curiosity-driven reinforcement learning can be repurposed as an active selection metric to prune low-information outdated entries from 2024-2025 SOTA episodic agent memory, outperforming existing recency or reward-based pruning baselines. This works because the prediction error that drives curiosity (ICM's forward prediction error, RND's prediction surprise) directly quantifies how much novel, actionable information a stored memory still holds for the agent's current planning.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
